LanguageData.HAR_OT_Hediff_e.label: Apostolos
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Hediff_e.description:
A state in which an Outerm is empowered by a higher force.

If the user dies while under this effect, she will revive once.
In exchange, the effect is immediately removed.

Powerful Outerms can receive blessings from the faceless god they worship, the "Void's ■■■."
To make that revelation real, they hurl themselves into battle as if feeding their own bodies to the flames.
Even if death waits at the end, they never stop.

This state ends after half a day.
